narrative:
Hill 1-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 961 registered voters, with 63.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
